title: Ubiquiti UACC-Lock-Strike-Secure-15mm - Electric Fail-Secure Lock, 15mm
description: Electric strike lock that connects to a UniFi Access Hub . The lock is fail-secure, remaining locked in the event of failure . It can be installed in wooden, steel, and aluminum frames. Holding force of up to 1200 kg . Power is supplied via a two-wire terminal block 12V/400mA UA-Hub-Door EAH-8 UA-Hub-Door-Mini UA-Ultra UA-Hub-Gate
specsSearch: Power Power type DC terminal Power via connector/terminal 12V DC
